creator: bapt@FreeBSD.org
text:
mirror_type is: the way you grab the list of mirrors:
srv will make dns srv queries based on the url specified on the repo, grab a list of potential mirrors and use them.

http will take the url you have requested strip it to / make a get on it and expect getting a text files with a list of potential mirrors to use.

If you have anything suggestion on how to improve the documentation to make it easier for users to understand, I'll be happy replace the current one
